1b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Square"}]," offers the best value with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"$$0 chargeback fees"}]," and even refunds processing fees if you win disputes",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-9","id":"user-content-fnref-9","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"9"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-10","id":"user-content-fnref-10","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"10"}]}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Stripe"}]," charges ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"$$15 per chargeback"}]," but does not refund this fee even if you win",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-9","id":"user-content-fnref-9-2","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"9"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-11","id":"user-content-fnref-11","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"11"}]}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Helcim"}]," charges ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"$$15 per chargeback"}]," but ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"refunds the fee if you win"}]," the dispute",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-12","id":"user-content-fnref-12","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"12"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-13","id":"user-content-fnref-13","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"13"}]}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"GoCardless"}]," has ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"variable chargeback fees"}]," depending on country - 1d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Chargeback fees are becoming increasingly expensive across the industry, with costs expected to grow 24% from 2025 to 2028",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-19","id":"user-content-fnref-19","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"19"}]}],". The average chargeback value in the US is $110, and each dispute costs financial institutions $9.08-$10.32 to process",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-19","id":"user-content-fnref-19-2","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"19"}]}],". For merchants, total chargeback costs include not just the fee but also the lost merchandise, administrative time, and potential monitoring program penalties",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-20","id":"user-content-fnref-20","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"20"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-21","id":"user-content-fnref-21","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"21"}]}],"."]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Square's zero chargeback fee policy"}]," makes it particularly attractive for businesses concerned about dispute costs, while ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Helcim's refund policy"}]," provides a middle ground. ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Melio's B2B focus"}]," naturally reduces chargeback exposure since business-to-business payments have lower dispute rates than consumer transactions."]}]

21:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Push-to-Card Technology:"}]," Astra uses push-to-card payments, which means funds are sent directly from a bank account or card to a recipient's debit card. This is done using the Visa Direct real-time payment rails, enabling funds to appear instantly and be spendable right away",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-1","id":"user-content-fnref-1-7","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"1"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-5","id":"user-content-fnref-5-2","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"5"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-6","id":"user-content-fnref-6-3","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"6"}]}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"API 23:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Industry-Standard Fee:"}]," For instant \"push\" payments to external debit cards, Astra typically charges an ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"industry-standard fee of 1.5% per transaction"}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-2","id":"user-content-fnref-2-3","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"2"}]}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cost-Plus Pricing:"}]," Astra offers cost-plus pricing designed to scale with customer growth, making it less costly than traditional wire transfers and competitive with other instant payment providers",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-5","id":"user-content-fnref-5-5","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"5"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-3","id":"user-content-fnref-3-2","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"3"}]}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Custom Fees:"}]," Businesses can optionally apply programmatic fees to each transaction to generate additional revenue",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-2","id":"user-content-fnref-2-4","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"2"}]}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No Additional Infrastructure Fees:"}]," There's no need for additional compliance, capital commitments, or operational overhead for instant payments",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-6","id":"user-content-fnref-6-4","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"6"}]}],"."]}],"\n"]}]

25:["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Feature"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Astra Payments Details"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Speed"}]}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Instant (real-time, 24/7, including weekends/holidays)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Method"}]}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Push-to-card (Visa Direct), API integration"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Typical Fee"}]}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"1.5% per transaction (industry standard)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Pricing Model"}]}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Cost-plus, scalable with business growth"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Operational Overhead"}]}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"No pre-funding, no extra compliance or capital required"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Security"}]}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Built-in compliance, fraud detection, PCI-compliant"}]]}]]}]]}]}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"In essence:"}]," Astra achieves instant payments by utilizing debit card rails (Visa Direct), with a typical cost of 1.5% per transaction and a scalable, cost-plus pricing model. The platform is designed for easy integration, security, and operational simplicity, making it attractive for fintechs, marketplaces, and businesses needing rapid, reliable fund movement",["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-1","id":"user-content-fnref-1-11","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"1"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-2","id":"user-content-fnref-2-5","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"2"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-5","id":"user-content-fnref-5-6","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"5"}]}],["$","sup",null,{"children":["$","$L2f",null,{"href":"#user-content-fn-6","id":"user-content-fnref-6-5","data-footnote-ref":true,"aria-describedby":"footnote-label","children":"6"}]}],"."]}]
